title: Seal v3 (Extended with Merkle Root)
description: Cryptographic seal binding town identity, ledger state, and Merkle root. Extends seal_v2 with ledger_merkle_root and ledger_size for federation light verification.

type.description: Seal type with Merkle root binding

final_cum_hash.description: Final cumulative hash of ledger (domain-separated HELEN_CUM_V1::)

env_hash.description: Deterministic environment hash (python_version + impl + sorted pip freeze)

kernel_hash.description: SHA256 of kernel source code (governance_vm.py + kernel modules)

ledger_merkle_root.description: NEW (v3): Merkle root over canonical ledger events. Enables light verification.

ledger_size.description: NEW (v3): Number of ledger events included in Merkle tree (must be power of 2)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when seal was created

sig.description: Ed25519 signature over (final_cum_hash || final_trace_hash || env_hash || kernel_hash || ledger_merkle_root || ledger_size || timestamp). Binds all identities to town.
